bugs.summary: The patch removes extensionless aliases for flat workflow JSON files.
bugs.impact: Project workflows such as workflows/review.json no longer resolve via /workflow run review, breaking documented named workflow invocation.
acceptableFixes: Restore the extensionless alias for flat .json workflow specs.
Keep a registry test that resolveWorkflowRef("review") finds workflows/review.json.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: Alias array change is easy to miss if reviewers focus on bundled workflows.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
